privileges.name: Web advanced drilling
privileges.description: Allow web user to use advanced drilling from attributes in the page by. Advanced drilling gives access to low priority drill paths.

privileges.name: Web export

privileges.name: Web print mode

privileges.description: Allow user to manage Report, Document, element and object caches.

privileges.description: Allow user to view the count, browse and detail information of all history list messages of other users.

privileges.name: Administer History Lists
privileges.description: Allow user to manage other users' History List messages.

privileges.name: Monitor Cubes
privileges.description: Allow user to view the count, browse and detail information of all cubes

privileges.name: Administer Cubes
privileges.description: Allow user to activate/de-activate, delete and refresh cubes

privileges.name: Fire events
privileges.description: Allow user to fire event.

privileges.name: Create and edit transmitters and devices
privileges.description: Allow user to create & edit transmitters and devices.

privileges.name: Create and edit contacts and addresses
privileges.description: Allow user to manage addresses for contacts and other users.

privileges.name: Create and edit security roles
privileges.description: Allow user to create and edit security roles.

privileges.name: Assign security roles
privileges.description: Allow user to grant (or revoke) security roles to a user for a specific project

privileges.name: Configure contacts data security profile
privileges.description: Allow user to link and unlink contacts for the purpose of defining data security

privileges.name: Reset user password
privileges.description: Allow user to change the passwords of other users.

privileges.name: Link users and groups to external accounts
privileges.description: Allow user to link other users to external accounts (NT, database, LDAP) as well as link groups to external groups (LDAP)

privileges.name: Grant/Revoke privilege
privileges.description: Allow user to define the privileges of security roles, users and groups. This is a very powerful privilege that is typically not granted to many administrators.

privileges.name: Configure group membership
privileges.description: Allow user to define group memberships i.e. to add/remove users to a group

privileges.name: Create and edit database logins
privileges.description: Allow user to create and edit database logins.

privileges.name: Create and edit Security Filters
privileges.description: Allow user to create and edit security filters.

privileges.name: Administer cluster
privileges.description: Allow user to add/remove a node to/from a cluster. This privilege also controls whether a user can set the default cluster membership at startup.

privileges.name: Load and unload project
privileges.description: Allow user to load and unload a project on a server. If the privilege is granted at the user level, the user can set up the asymmetric clustering map for all projects in the cluster.

privileges.name: Idle and resume project
privileges.description: Allow user to idle and resume projects on a server.

privileges.name: Define Intelligent Cube Report
privileges.description: Allow user to create a view Report using an Intelligent Cube as a datasource.

privileges.name: Use Intelligent Cube Editor
privileges.description: Allow user to use Cube Report Editor to design cubes from Developer.

privileges.name: Publish Intelligent Cube
privileges.description: Allow user to execute cube Reports from Developer.

privileges.name: Web define Intelligent Cube Report
privileges.description: Allow the web user to create a view Report using an Intelligent Cube as a datasource

privileges.name: Web publish Intelligent Cube
privileges.description: Determines whether cube Reports should appear in the folder navigation pages for Web or Office.

privileges.name: Configure server basic
privileges.description: Allow the user to create and edit server definitions, set basic server definition properties, whitelist URLs for export, and use Developer to start/stop Intelligence Server.

privileges.name: Configure statistics
privileges.description: Allow user to read and set the statistics configuration, purge statistics

privileges.name: Configure security settings
privileges.description: Allow user to read and set security-related properties such as password policy & authentication settings

privileges.name: Configure History Lists
privileges.description: Allow user to read and set the history-list related properties including the option for file-based vs. database-based, the history list directory or database instance

privileges.name: Configure governing
privileges.description: Allow user to read and set the governing-related properties

privileges.name: Configure caches
privileges.description: Allow user to read and set the report, element and object caching properties at the project level including the cache directory

privileges.name: Configure project basic
privileges.description: Allow user to read and set general project properties including the project description, default drill maps and drill properties, PDF properties, etc.

privileges.name: Configure connection map
privileges.description: Allow user to read, configure and refresh the connection maps for a project.

privileges.name: Configure project data source
privileges.description: Allow user to read and set the primary database instance of a project as well as add and remove secondary database instances (for use in datamarts, Freeform SQL and Query Builder and MDX)

privileges.name: Enable user
privileges.description: Allow user to enable other users. By default, when a user administrator creates a new user, unless the administrator has the “Enable users” privilege, the newly created user will be disabled.

privileges.name: Configure subscription settings
privileges.description: Allow user to configure subscription settings such as email notifications for successful subscriptions.

privileges.name: Configure change journaling
privileges.description: Allow user to configure change journaling settings such as enable/disable journaling and to purge the change journal for a particular duration.

privileges.name: Configure language settings
privileges.description: Allow user to configure language settings such as the metadata languages, the data languages & the user default language preferences.

privileges.name: Audit change journal
privileges.description: Allow user to view the change history for all objects.

privileges.name: Use Repository Translation Wizard
privileges.description: Allow user to export/import translations in bulk using the Repository Translation Wizard.

privileges.name: Use Bulk Export Editor
privileges.description: Allow user to use Bulk Export Editor.

privileges.name: Administer jobs
privileges.description: Allow user to perform job administration activities such as killing jobs submitted by other users.

privileges.name: Administer user connections
privileges.description: Allow user to perform user connection administration activities such as disconnecting user sessions opened by other users.

privileges.name: Administer database connections
privileges.description: Allow user to perform database connection administration activities such as disconnecting database connections.

privileges.name: Duplicate project
privileges.description: Allow user to select source projects for duplication. The user must be a member of system administrators group in the destination environment.

privileges.name: Web subscribe others
privileges.description: Allow web user to create History List and cache subscriptions to others. For email, file, print subscriptions and mobile subscriptions [Use Distribution Services]  & [Use Mobile] respectively are required in addition to this privilege.

privileges.name: Web create alert
privileges.description: Allow web user to create alerts and to send different content.

privileges.name: Use link to History List in Email
privileges.description: Allow user to  receive an Email subscription with a link to History List.

privileges.name: Export to PDF
privileges.description: Allow user to export to PDF.

privileges.name: Export to HTML
privileges.description: Allow user to export to HTML.

privileges.name: Export to Excel
privileges.description: Allow user to export to Excel.

privileges.name: Export to text
privileges.description: Allow user to export to Text.

privileges.name: Export to Flash
privileges.description: Allow user to export to Flash.

privileges.name: View notes
privileges.description: Allow user to view notes.

privileges.name: Add notes
privileges.description: Allow user to add notes.

privileges.name: Edit notes
privileges.description: Allow user to edit notes.

privileges.name: Use distribution services
privileges.description: Allow user to receive email, file & print subscriptions and use other distribution services features.

privileges.name: Use send now
privileges.description: Allow user to send now for Email, file, print, bulk export subscriptions

privileges.name: Enable Intelligence Server administration from Web
privileges.description: Allow user to access Intelligence Server administration features from Web.

privileges.name: Use Translation Editor
privileges.description: Allow user to use Translation Editor for internationalized metadata.

privileges.name: Web use Prompt Editor
privileges.description: Allow web user to create and edit prompts using the Prompt Editor. Note that this privilege is not required to create or edit prompts within a filter.

privileges.name: Create custom HTML and JavaScript content
privileges.description: Allow user to create and edit HTML containers in Documents from Developer.

privileges.name: Import table from multiple data sources
privileges.description: Allow an Architect to import tables from a project's secondary database instances.

privileges.name: Execute Report that uses multiple data sources
privileges.description: Allow a user to execute Reports that require heterogeneous data access.

privileges.name: Save personal prompt answers
privileges.description: Allow user to save and reuse personal prompt answers.

privileges.name: Web define Derived Elements
privileges.description: Allow web user to create and edit Derived Elements within a Report and to use Derived Elements that have been created by another user

privileges.name: Web use Visual Threshold Editor
privileges.description: Allow the web user to use the basic Threshold Editor and quick thresholds. The basic Threshold Editor can also be used for conditional formatting in Report Services Documents.

privileges.name: Web Dashboard design
privileges.description: Allow web user to create and edit layouts within a Document.

privileges.name: Web save Derived Elements
privileges.description: Allow web user to create and edit stand-alone Derived Elements, Derived Elements within a report and to use derived elements that have been created by another user

privileges.name: Web use Advanced Threshold Editor
privileges.description: Allow web user to use advanced Threshold Editor for threshold definition within datasets and conditional formatting definition in Report Services Documents.

privileges.name: Web edit drilling and links
privileges.description: Allow web user to create and edit links and configure drill options for Reports and Documents.

privileges.name: Define Derived Elements
privileges.description: Allow Developer user to create and edit Derived Elements within a Report and to use Derived Elements that have been created by another user

privileges.name: Save Derived Elements
privileges.description: Allow Developer user to create and edit stand-alone Derived Elements, Derived Elements within a Report and to use Derived Elements that have been created by another user

privileges.name: Use Link Editor
privileges.description: Allow user to use Link Editor in Reports and Documents.

privileges.name: Web edit notes
privileges.description: Allow web user to edit notes.

privileges.name: Drill and link
privileges.description: Allow Developer user to create and edit links and configure drill options for Reports and Documents.

privileges.name: Web define advanced Report options
privileges.description: Allow web user to define advanced Report options such as run modes, export modes and Report details properties.

privileges.name: Web create custom HTML and JavaScript content
privileges.description: Allow web user to create and edit HTML containers in Documents from Developer.

privileges.name: Use analytics
privileges.description: Allow user to use analytics.

privileges.name: Use dynamic sourcing
privileges.description: Allow user to use dynamic sourcing.

privileges.name: Use SQL statements tab in Datamart/Bulk Export Editors
privileges.description: Allow user to use SQL Statements tab in Datamart/Bulk Export Editors.

privileges.name: Web use Custom Group Editor
privileges.description: Allow web user to use Custom Group editor.

privileges.name: Access data (files) from Local, URL, DropBox, Google Drive, Sample Files, Clipboard, Push API
privileges.description: Allow web user to access data (files) from Local, URL, DropBox, Google Drive, Sample Files, Clipboard.

privileges.name: Access data from Databases, Google BigQuery, BigData, OLAP, BI tools
privileges.description: Allow web user to access data from databases, Google BigQuery, BigData, OLAP, BI tools.

privileges.description: Allow user to define transaction Report.

privileges.name: Web configure Transaction
privileges.description: Allow web user to configure transaction.

privileges.name: Execute Transaction
privileges.description: Allow user to execute transaction.

privileges.description: Allows the user to open an analysis in Visual Insight Mode.  A user without this privilege but who has Execute Analysis or Document privilege can still open an analysis in Flash or Express Mode, but not in Visual Insight Mode.

privileges.name: Use Object Manager Read-only
privileges.description: Allow user to use Object Manager as read-only.

privileges.name: Use Translation Editor bypass
privileges.description: Allow user to change a translation in their language without requiring write access to that object.

privileges.name: Web use Access Management Editor
privileges.description: Allow web user to use Access Management Editor.

privileges.description: Allow web user to create a dashboard.

privileges.description: Allow web user to save a dashboard.

privileges.description: Allow user to publish content to other users or user groups. This includes dashboards, documents, reports and bots.

privileges.name: Create dataset in Workstation
privileges.description: Allow user to create a dataset in Workstation

privileges.name: Use collaboration services
privileges.description: Grants access to Collaboration Services

privileges.name: Administer environment
privileges.description: Grants access to manage environments via Workstation

privileges.name: Use Workstation
privileges.description: Allow user to connect to IServer from Workstation.

privileges.name: Use Application
privileges.description: Provide the ability for organizations to connect to the Intelligence Server through custom applications.

privileges.name: Use Library Web
privileges.description: Enable users to connect to the Library Web application using a web browser.

privileges.name: Monitor environment
privileges.description: Grants access to monitor environments via Workstation

privileges.name: Use Application Tableau
privileges.description: Use Tableau Data Connector

privileges.name: Use Application PowerBI
privileges.description: Use PowerBI Data Connector

privileges.name: Use Application Qlik
privileges.description: Use Qlik Data Connector

privileges.name: Use Application Office
privileges.description: Use Strategy for Office Plug-In

privileges.name: Use Hyper Office
privileges.description: Use of HyperIntelligence functionality in Office programs (i.e. Outlook)

privileges.name: Use Hyper Web
privileges.description: Use of HyperIntelligence functionality via Web Browsers

privileges.name: Use Hyper Mobile
privileges.description: Use of HyperIntelligence functionality via Hyper Mobile App

privileges.name: Use Hyper SDK
privileges.description: Use of HyperIntelligence functionality via SDK

privileges.name: Use Application Jupyter
privileges.description: Use Jupyter Connector

privileges.name: Use Application RStudio
privileges.description: Use RStudio Connector

privileges.name: Enable on-premise data access via gateway agent
privileges.description: Allow user to enable on-premise data source access capability and configure governance of destinations

privileges.name: Manage Content Group
privileges.description: Allow user to create, edit and delete Content Group.

privileges.name: Create package
privileges.description: Allow user to create and edit application or configuration packages to be deployed on a system

privileges.name: Manage Migration Packages
privileges.description: Allows users to administer Migration Packages and perform actions such as: migrate across Projects and Environments, download or upload to the Storage Service, validate, reuse, reverse

privileges.name: Certify Python Scripts
privileges.description: Allow users to certify Python scripts

privileges.name: Manage Library Application
privileges.description: Allow user to create, edit and delete Library Application

privileges.name: Generate API token
privileges.description: Allow user to generate an API token to be used in APIs to identify and authenticate the user

privileges.name: Manage Runtime
privileges.description: Allow user to create and edit the script runtime environment object via Workstation

privileges.name: Add KPI to Insights
privileges.description: Allow users to add, view, edit and delete KPIs from their Insights page.

privileges.name: Receive Insights
privileges.description: Allow users to discover and receive insights based on their KPIs through the Insights panel.

privileges.name: Use Scripts Python
privileges.description: Allow user to use Python through Workstation Scripts section.

privileges.name: Model data from streaming sources (KAFKA, others)
privileges.description: Allow Analytics Architect to model data from streaming sources (KAFKA, others).

privileges.name: Certify Migration Package
privileges.description: Users with this privilege can certify or decertify Migration Packages

privileges.name: Configure gateways and drivers
privileges.description: Allow user to configure gateways and drivers.

privileges.name: Create Workflow
privileges.description: Providing user the ability to create, edit, validate and save workflows. Cannot execute/schedule the workflow with this privilege alone.

privileges.name: Execute Workflow
privileges.description: Providing user the ability to execute and schedule workflows.

privileges.name: Certify Workflow
privileges.description: Providing user the ability to certify / decertify workflows.

privileges.name: Use Auto Assistant and ML Visualizations
privileges.description: Providing user the ability to use Auto Assistant and create ML Visualizations.

privileges.name: Create and Edit AI Bots
privileges.description: Providing user the ability to create and edit AI Bots.

privileges.name: Run AI Bots
privileges.description: Providing user the ability to run AI Bots.

privileges.name: Create and Configure Knowledge Assets
privileges.description: Allow user to build and manage knowledge definitions in the environment.

privileges.name: Create and edit Vault connections
privileges.description: This is the privilege required to create and configure Vault connection

privileges.name: Use Mosaic Studio
privileges.description: Allow user to use Mosaic Studio

privileges.name: Administer Planned Tasks
privileges.description: Allow users to create, edit and delete their own planned tasks, as well as deactivate and delete tasks created by others.

privileges.name: Monitor Planned Tasks
privileges.description: Allow the user to monitor and view details of planned tasks.

privileges.name: Subscribe to Microsoft OneDrive
privileges.description: Allow user to create Microsoft OneDrive subscriptions.

privileges.name: Subscribe to Microsoft SharePoint
privileges.description: Allow user to create Microsoft SharePoint subscriptions.

privileges.name: Use Universal Access
privileges.description: Allows users to access and query the semantic layer using SQL or DAX(XMLA) against datasets, attributes and metrics, using third-party clients.

privileges.name: Create and Configure Unstructured Data
privileges.description: Allow user to manage unstructured data in the environment

privileges.name: Use Google Workspace Add-ons
privileges.description: Grants the user access to sign in and retrieve governed data from Library using Strategy add-ons for Google Workspace, such as Google Sheets.

privileges.name: Use Mosaic Data Catalog
privileges.description: Allows users to view and explore Mosaic models within Strategy Library.

privileges.name: Create and edit Scope Filters
privileges.description: Allow user to create and edit scope filters.

privileges.name: Assign Scope Filters
privileges.description: Allow user to grant and revoke scope filters.
